title: How to Get a Police Certificate – Azerbaijan - Canada.ca
content:
## How to Get a Police Certificate – Azerbaijan
If you need to give your fingerprints for a police certificate, this isn’t the same as giving your biometrics (fingerprints and photo) for an application.
Do I need to provide a Police Certificate with my Application for Permanent Residence? Yes
Name of document(s) to get: Police Certificate “Reference”

## How to get a Police Certificate:

### If you are a citizen of Azerbaijan:

#### If you live in Azerbaijan:
You should apply at the Ministry of Interior (see Special notes and considerations for complete address).

#### If you live outside of Azerbaijan:
You should apply at the Consular Section of your nearest Embassy of Azerbaijan.

### If you are not a citizen of Azerbaijan:

#### If you live in Azerbaijan:
You should apply at the Ministry of Interior (see Special notes and considerations for complete address).

#### If you live outside of Azerbaijan:
You should apply at the Consular Section of your nearest Embassy of Azerbaijan.

### Information and documents you need:
- Completed application, along with: Your full name Your date and place of birth Your citizenship status and residential address Series, number, date of issue and issuing agency of your ID Card (Passport for non-citizens)
- Your date and place of birth
- Your citizenship status and residential address
- Series, number, date of issue and issuing agency of your ID Card (Passport for non-citizens)

### Special notes and considerations
Administration of Operational Statistic Information of the Ministry of Interior 7 Gusi Gadjieva Street Baku 370005 Telephone: (99412) 986396, 909285-4909636
